## Necromunda Gang

![][image1]

### Necromunda Gang Special Rules

**Gang.** When creating a Necromunda Gang Warband, you must choose one of the gangs listed below. You can take the special models and battlekit from that gang, and follow any additional special rules it has, but you cannot take any models or battlekit from any of the other gangs.

If a piece of battlekit appears in both the Necromunda Gang Shared Armoury and your Gang’s Armoury, use the cost and LIMIT from your Gang’s Armoury.

**Fast Learners.** You roll an additional Promotion Die at the end of each battle. In addition, when one of your models is promoted to Elite, it immediately gains a Campaign Skill. Choose one of the available Skill Charts and roll 2D6 on it. Reroll results of 2 or 12\. The model has that skill in addition to any it learns via XP.

### Necromunda Gang Patrons

Your patron can be a Gang Overlord. If your Warband is an Imperium Warband, your patron can be a Wealthy Noble. If your Warband is an Outlaw Warband, your patron can be a Sump Lord.

#### Patron: Gang Overlord

* **Crushing Blow.** When this model Downs an enemy with a melee attack (even if it is already Down), that enemy suffers an additional STUN MARKER.  
* **Gang Territory.** This model gains the Set Dice Exploration Skill.  
* **Overpower.** Select any skill you want from the Melee & Strength Skills.  
* **Mighty Leap.** This model automatically succeeds when it takes the Jump Success Roll.  
* **Fearsome.** This model gains the FEAR Keyword.  
* **True Grit.** Injury rolls made against this model as a result of falling, Dangerous Terrain, or non-attack Abilities or psychic powers have \-2 DICE.

#### Patron: Sump Lord

* **Catfall.** This model does not suffer Injury rolls as a result of falling, and it does not fall Down or suffer an Injury roll due to failing a Diving Charge.  
* **Down and Dirty.** This model ignores the penalties to Success Roll rolls from being Down. Additionally, this model gains \+1 DICE to Hit and Injure Down enemy models with Melee Attacks.  
* **In the Shadows.** Select any skill you want from the Stealth & Speed Skills.  
* **Iron Jaw.** Injury rolls made against this model as a result of melee attacks have \-1 DICE.  
* **Lie Low.** While this model is in cover against such an attack, enemies cannot make ranged attacks at Long Range against it (even if the attack normally ignores Cover or Long Range, or hits automatically).  
* **Tunnel Runner.** This model gains the Seek and Circle Back Exploration skills.

#### Patron: Wealthy Noble

* **Counter Attack.** When an enemy makes a melee attack against this model, this model can make a melee attack against that enemy afterwards, if it is not taken Out of Action. It can do so only once during each model’s Activation.  
* **Expedition Funding.** This model gains the Extra Dice Exploration Skill twice.  
* **Firearm Procurement (LIMIT: 1).** The cost of any ranged weapon worth 20 ducats or more is reduced by 5 ducats if the model with this skill is part of the Warband. Note that weapons bought with this lower cost make it easier for you to fit under the Threshold value.  
* **Hotshot.** Select any skill you want from the Ranged Skills.  
* **Inspirational.** This model and its allies within 6” have the NEGATE FEAR Keyword.  
* **Team Work.** This model may form a FIRETEAM with any one non-ELITE model of the Warband. In addition, the first time either model fails a Risky Success Roll during a Fireteam Activation, the Activation does not end.

### Necromunda Gang Unique Battlekit

#### Necromunda Gang Equipment

* **Caryatid.** Once per battle, when the owner is hit by an attack, you can force the attacker to reroll that attack at \-2 DICE.  
* **Ridgerunner.** The equipped model is mounted on a bike. The rider gains the LARGE Keyword if it is not already LARGE, as well as the VEHICLE Keyword, a movement speed of 10”/Infantry, but has only one hand to carry other weapons, though it can hold two-handed weapons with Shield Combo. It also has the Outrider abilities.  
  * **Outrider.** The rider has \+1 DICE to all Dash Success Rolls, but it cannot climb sheer surfaces.  
* **Stim-Slug Cache.** Once during each battle, at the start of any of its Activations, the equipped model can gain one of the following benefits. Once used, at the end of the Turn, the equipped model must roll on the INJURY table, with IGNORE ARMOUR and \-1 INJURY DICE.  
  * Remove D3 BLOOD MARKERS from the model.  
  * The model gains \+2” movement speed and \+1 DICE to Hit with all attacks.

#### Necromunda Gang Chem Equipment

A model can equip only one Chem Equipment at a time.

* **Frenzon.** The model has \+1 DICE to Hit in melee, but at the start of each Activation, if there are any enemy models within 12” that it can see, its first action must be to Charge the closest enemy.  
* **Ghast.** At the start of the battle, roll for a random Shared Psychic Discipline (or a random House Delaque Psychic Discipline if your gang is House Delaque), and two different random Powers from that Discipline. The model gains those powers and the PSYKER 1 Keyword until the end of the battle, but its psychic powers have PERILOUS ±2.  
* **‘Slaught.** The model gains \+1 INJURY DICE in melee. If a model has ever been equipped with this Chem Equipment and is not equipped with it during a battle, add \+1 DICE to Injury rolls against that model.  
* **Spur.** The model gains \+1” movement speed. At the end of each of the model’s Activations, it must make a Success Roll. On a failure, the Spur has worn off and ceases to function.  
* **Stinger Mould.** The model can ignore the effects of one Trauma it has suffered for the duration of the battle.

### Necromunda Gang Campaign Shop

During a campaign, these pieces of battlekit are available only when your Warband is specifically allowed to purchase them.

**Alliances.** Alliances provide you with passive abilities that apply without being equipped to any model, and each grants you a set of mercenaries called a Delegation, which can only be acquired by purchasing these Alliances from the Campaign Shop. You must have room in your Warband for any ELITE models. You can purchase only one Alliance at a time, and if you sell the Alliance, its cost is considered to cost 1 Glory plus the cost of all of the Delegation Mercenaries still in your Warband. If one or more of the Delegation mercenaries is killed or otherwise removed from your Warband, you can purchase replacements at its normal cost, without the need for another Campaign Shop purchase.

* **Cold Traders Alliance (8 Glory, Outlaw Warband Only).** Delegation of a Cold Trader, a Bosun, and two Void-Born Scum. Add the following Xenos weapons to your Armoury, but you can purchase only a total of up to 6 of these weapons, and only up to 1 of each.  
  * From the Aeldari Battlekit List: Avenger Shuriken Catapult, Death Spinner, Mist Staff, Plasma Grenades, Shuriken Cannon, Shuriken Catapult, Shuriken Pistol.  
  * From the Drukhari Battlekit List: Agonizer, Splinter Cannon, Splinter Pistol, Splinter Rifle.  
  * From the Leagues of Votann Battlekit List: Ion Blaster, Ion Pistol, Magna Rail Rifle, Volkanite Disintegrator.  
  * From the Necrons Battlekit List: Gauss Blaster, Gauss Cannon, Gauss Flayer, Gauss Reaper, Tesla Cannon, Voidblade.  
  * From the T’au Empire Battlekit List: Bladestave, EMP Grenades, Honor Blade, Photon Grenades, Pulse Blaster, Pulse Carbine, Pulse Rifle, Rail Rifle.  
* **Fallen Houses Alliance (5 Glory, Outlaw Warband Only).** Delegation of a Rebel Lord. You earn an additional 1D6x10 credits at the end of each battle.  
* **House Catallus Alliance (7 Glory).** Delegation of a Masked Killer and a Mindfrayed. Your models ignore the Captured and Robbed result on the Elite Trauma table.  
* **House Greim Alliance (8 Glory).** Delegation of a Krieg Mester and a Jagerkin. You can purchase any of the following Ammunition Equipment, and that equipment loses CONSUMABLE while you have this Alliance.  
  * **Dum-Dum Ammunition (5 credits, LIMIT: 2).** AMMUNITION (CRITICAL). Autogun, Autopistol, Stub Pistol, or Heavy Stubber only.  
  * **Frag Ammunition (5 credits, LIMIT: 1).** AMMUNITION (BLAST 2”, SHRAPNEL, \-1 INJURY DICE). Bolt Carbine, Boltgun, Bolt Rifle, Bolt Sniper Rifle, Assault Bolter, Bolt Pistol, or Heavy Bolt Pistol, or the Bolter or Bolt Pistol mode of a combined weapon only.  
  * **Manstopper Ammunition (10 credits, LIMIT: 2).** AMMUNITION (+1 INJURY MODIFIER against any target that has no armour, including shields). Autogun, Autopistol, Stub Pistol, or Heavy Stubber only.  
  * **Phosphor Ammunition (5 credits, LIMIT: 1).** AMMUNITION (IGNORE COVER). Autogun, Automatic Shotgun, Shotgun, Autopistol, Stub Pistol, or Heavy Stubber only.  
  * **Radium Ammunition (10 credits, LIMIT: 1).** AMMUNITION (GAS). Autogun, Automatic Shotgun, Shotgun, Autopistol, Stub Pistol, or Heavy Stubber only.  
  * **Shock Ammunition (5 credits, LIMIT: 2).** AMMUNITION (STUN). One Autogun, Automatic Shotgun, Shotgun, Autopistol, Stub Pistol, or Heavy Stubber only.  
  * **Vengeance Ammunition (10 credits, LIMIT: 1).** AMMUNITION (ARMOUR PIERCING 1). Bolt Carbine, Boltgun, Bolt Rifle, Bolt Sniper Rifle, Assault Bolter, Bolt Pistol, or Heavy Bolt Pistol, or the Bolter or Bolt Pistol mode of a combined weapon only.  
* **House Ko’iron (9 Glory).** Delegation of a Prima Materis and two Frateris Bodyguards. At the start of each battle, before deployment, you can choose one of your non-Mercenary models. That model counts as being equipped with a Holy Relic during that battle.  
* **House Ran Lo Alliance (7 Glory).** Delegation of an Auditor and a Gelt-Scrivener. At the end of each battle, after Exploration, if your opponent earned more credits from this battle, from exploration and any other sources, you earn half the difference in credits. Models gained from Reinforcing do not count as earned credits.  
* **House Ty Alliance (7 Glory).** Delegation of an Onmyoto Telepath and an Onmyoto Null. Choose one other PSYKER model in your Warband, then randomly select a Shared Psychic Power (roll a D6 for Discipline and a D6 for power). That model learns that power without paying for it, which does not count towards its normal limits or towards your credit limit for a mission. It loses this power if you sell this Alliance. If you have no PSYKER models, you can give this benefit to any one PSYKER you later recruit, or to a model that gains the PSYKER Keyword.  
* **House Ulanti Alliance (8 Glory).** Delegation of an Ulanti Courtier and a Mirror Mask. You earn an additional 1D6x10 credits at the end of each battle.  
* **Imperial House Alliance (7 Glory, Imperial Warband Only).** Delegation of two Enforcer Bodyguards. You have the Circle Back Exploration Skill.  
* **Imperial Imposters Alliance (5 Glory, Outlaw Warband Only).** Delegation of a Master Charlatan. Your warband counts as an Imperium Warband in addition to its other type(s) for the purpose of recruiting Mercenaries, and the first such Mercenary you recruit costs 1 less Glory. If you sell this Alliance, all of your Imperium Mercenaries count as part of the Delegation, but the first counts as costing 1 less Glory.  
* **Mercator Gelt: The Guild of Coin Alliance (8 Glory, non-Outlaw Warband Only).** Delegation of a Master of Coin, a Skinflint, and two Grovellers (one with a Longlas). You have the Seek Exploration Skill.  
* **Mercator Munda: The Iron Guild Alliance (6 Glory, non-Outlaw Warband Only).** Delegation of five Guild Dregs. You can purchase weapons from the Venators Armoury as if it were your Gang’s Armoury.  
* **Mercator Nautica: The Water Guild Alliance (8 Glory, non-Outlaw Warband Only).** Delegation of a Master Nautican, a Syphonite, and a Subnautican. At the end of each battle, you can reroll one Casualty or Elite Taruma roll for one of your models.  
* **Mercator Pallidus: The Corpse Guild Alliance (8 Glory, non-Outlaw Warband Only).** Delegation of a Pale Consort, a Bone Scrivener, and two Corpse Grinders (not to be confused with the Corpsegrinder Cult). For each non-ARTIFICIAL non-VEHICLE non-NECRON model killed, enemy or friendly, during the Trauma Step after a battle you participated in, you earn credits equal to half the model’s credit cost (rounded down), or 10 credits per 1 Glory it cost. This counts only the model’s base cost, and not any equipment if it was purchased separately. You earn half as many credits from MECHANICUS models.  
* **Mercator Pyros: The Promethium Guild Alliance (8 Glory, non-Outlaw Warband Only).** Delegation of a Pyrocaen Lord, a Pyromagir, and two Cynders. Add the following weapons to your Armoury: Hand Flamer (20 credits, LIMIT: 2), Flamer (30 credits, LIMIT: 3), Heavy Flamer (55 credits, LIMIT: 1), Plasma Pistol (20 credits, LIMIT: 2), Plasma Gun (30 credits, LIMIT: 1), Plasma Cannon (60 credits, LIMIT: 1). Use the higher LIMIT if the weapon already appears in your Armoury. If you sell this contract, you must sell any of these weapons no longer allowed by your normal Armoury.  
* **Mercator Sanguis: The Slave Guild Alliance (8 Glory, non-Outlaw Warband Only).** Delegation of a Chain Lord, a Shackleman, and two Pit Fighters. After rolling on both skill tables during Advancement, each of your Elite models can reroll one of the results. This applies only to Advancement, and not to skill gained any other way.  
* **Narco Lords Alliance (6 Glory, Outlaw Warband Only).** Delegation of five Narco Scum. You can ignore the CONSUMABLE property of Chem Equipment, and increase the LIMIT of each Chem Equipment from the Necromunda Gang Shared Armoury by 1\.  
* **Psi-Syndica Alliance (5 Glory, Outlaw Warband Only).** Delegation of a Mind-Locked Wyrd. One of your models of your choice gains the PSYKER 1 Keyword. Randomly select a Shared Discipline. That model can purchase up to two powers from that Discipline, but can use it only while equipped with a PSYCHIC weapon. It loses this Keyword and its powers if you sell this Alliance.  
* **Rogue Factoria Alliance (8 Glory, Outlaw Warband Only).** Delegation of a Factoria Overseer, a Work Party Boss, and three Factoria Workers. You can purchase Counterfeit versions of any weapon you have access to, or any weapon from the Venators Armoury, that costs 15 or more credits and that do not have the RISKY Keyword. These weapons cost 5 fewer credits, gain the RISKY Keyword, and the attacker must roll on the Injury Table on a miss.

**Hangers On.** Hangers on function just like equipment. You can use a model to represent them, but you do not need to. A model can be equipped with only up to 1 hanger on at a time. A hanger on must be equipped to a model fielded during a battle in order to use any of its pre- or post-battle effects.

* **Agitator (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Outlaw Only).** Once per battle, the equipped model or an ally within 12” of it can reroll a Dash Success Roll. In addition, at the start of the battle, you can boast that you are going to win. If you win the battle, you gain 1 Glory. If you lose the battle, you gain 1 fewer Glory from that battle, if you gained any. On a tie, nothing happens.  
* **Ammo-Jack (2 Glory, LIMIT: 3).** Once per battle, the equipped model can reroll one ranged attack Success Roll it makes.  
* **Cadaver Merchant (1 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Outlaw Only).** Once per battle, you can give the equipped model FEAR when it is attacked in melee. This keyword lasts until the end of the current Turn. In addition, at the end of each battle, you earn 10 credits for every model that was a casualty, on either side, during that battle.  
* **Chem Dealer (1 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** Once during each battle, the equipped model can gain the effects of one chem equipment from the Necromunda Gang Armoury for one entire Activation. If you choose ‘Slaught, the drawback applies only during this battle. In addition, one chem equipment equipped by the same model loses CONSUMABLE while both remain equipped.  
* **Data-Skrivener (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** Once during each battle, the equipped model can gain \+1 DICE on any one Success Roll that is not an attack or Dash Success Roll. In addition, you have the Lucky Exploration Skill.  
* **Dome Runner (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** Once during each battle, when a ranged attack misses it, the equipped model can take a Standard Move or Retreat Action, but can move only up to 3”. In addition, you have the Seek Exploration Skill.  
* **Fixer (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Imperial Only).** Once during each battle, when this model falls Down, it can immediately stand up again. In addition, you have the Circle Back Exploration Skill.  
* **Gang Lookout (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** Once during each battle, if your opponent would activate the first model during a Turn, you can activate this model first. In addition, you have the Reroll Exploration Skill.  
* **Heretek (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Outlaw Only).** Once during each Battle, the equipped model can add the GAS, FIRE, or SHRAPNEL Keyword to one attack it hits with.  
* **’Narker (1 Glory, LIMIT: 2).** One per battle, you can set the result of one Charge roll made against this model to 1\. In addition, you have the Reroll Exploration skill.  
* **Propagandist (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** Once per battle, you can gain \+1 DICE to a Morale roll. In addition, at the end of each battle, roll a D6. On a 5-6, you gain 1 Glory.  
* **Proxy (2 Glory, LIMIT: 1, Outlaw Only).** Once during each battle, when this model falls Down, it can immediately stand up again. In addition, you have the Duplicate Exploration Skill.  
* **Rogue Doc (2 Glory, LIMIT: 2).** Once per battle, during its Activation, you can remove 1 BLOOD MARKER from the equipped model.  
* **Slopper (1 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** At the end of the battle, you can reroll one Casualty or Elite Taruma roll (for any model in your Warband).  
* **Underhive Trader (1 Glory, LIMIT: 1).** You have the Extra Dice Exploration Skill.

### Necromunda Gang Elites

#### 1 Gang Leader (Cost: 60 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Gang Leader | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Gang Leader can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Necromunda Gang Armoury or your chosen Gang’s Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Around the Hive.** The Gang Leader begins with one Campaign Skill. Choose two of the available Skill Charts and roll 2D6 on each. Reroll results of 2 or 12\. The Gang Leader has your choice of one of the rolled skills in addition to any it learns via XP.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GANGER, LEADER, TOUGH

#### 0-2 Gang Champion (Cost: 50 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Gang Champion | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Gang Champion can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Necromunda Gang Armoury or your chosen Gang’s Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **Experienced.** The Gang Champion begins with one Campaign Skill. Choose one of the available Skill Charts and roll 2D6 on it. Reroll results of 2 or 12\. The Gang Champion has that skill in addition to any it learns via XP.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GANGER

### Necromunda Gang Troops

#### Juve (Cost: 15 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Juve | 6”/Infantry | \-1 | \-1 | 0 | 25-28mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Juve can be equipped with any Basic Ranged, Pistol, or Basic Melee weapons, armour besides Heavy Armour, or any equipment, all from the Necromunda Gang Armoury or your chosen Gang’s Armoury.

**Abilities**

* **New Kid.** After a Juve has participated in at least two missions, or if it scores a Glorious Deed or takes an enemy Elite model Out of Action, you can upgrade it to a Ganger for free at the end of a battle, and it can choose the Veteran Specialty. It uses its new cost when calculating how many credits worth of models you can bring to a mission, and you can purchase any upgrades for it so long as you do not surpass any limits.

**Keywords**  
GANGER, NO PROMOTION

#### Ganger (Cost: 35 Credits)

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Ganger | 6”/Infantry | \+0 or \+1 | \+0 or \+1 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Ganger can be equipped with any weapons, armour, or equipment from the Necromunda Gang Armoury or your chosen Gang’s Armoury.

When you recruit a Ganger, you must choose one of the following Specialties:

* **Bruiser.** The Ganger has \+1 Melee and \+0 Ranged.  
* **Shooter.** The Ganger has \+1 Ranged and \+0 Melee.  
* **Veteran.** The Ganger has \+1 Ranged and \+1 Melee. You can select this option only if the Ganger was upgraded from a Juve.

**Upgrades**

* **Heavy.** Up to 2 of your Gangers can be upgraded to Heavies for \+5 credits each, allowing them to ignore the HEAVY Keyword of one piece of battlekit they carry. They can still carry only one piece of HEAVY battlekit each, and it still takes up the normal number of hands.

**Keywords**  
GANGER

### Outlaw Necromunda Gang Mercenaries

If your gang is an Outlaw Warband (the default for this faction), you can recruit the following mercenaries:

#### Hive Mercenaries

* 0-1 Awakened Ogryn (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Deep Hive Hunter (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-3 Hired Gun (Cost: 2-3 Glory)  
* 0-2 Hive Scum (Cost: 1 Glory) Necromunda Gang Only  
* 0-1 Jotunn Servitor Ogryn (Cost: 3 Glory)

#### Hive Beast Mercenaries

* 0-2 Giant Rat (Cost: 1 Glory) Unavailable to House Cawdor  
* 0-2 Grapplehawk (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Gyrinx Cat (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Sump Beast (Cost: 3 Glory)

#### Robot Mercenaries

* 0-1 Ambot (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Hacked Cyber Mastiff (Cost: 2 Glory) Unavailable to House Orlock  
* 0-1 Iron Automata (Cost: 5 Glory)

#### Wasteland Beast Mercenaries

* 0-2 Outland Beast Master (Cost: 3 Glory)

**Max 1 type of BEAST per Outland Beast Master, plus 1 for Ash Waste Nomads:**

* 0-2 Borewyrm Swarm (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Giant Grapplehawk (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-3 Giant Wasteland Rat (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-3 Millisaur (Cost: 2 Glory)

### 

### Imperium Necromunda Gang Mercenaries

If your gang is an Imperium Warband, you can recruit the following mercenaries:

#### Assassinorum Mercenaries

**Max 1 per Warband:**

* 0-1 Adamus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Callidus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Culexus Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Eversor Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Vanus Infocyte (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Venenum Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)  
* 0-1 Vindicare Assassin (Cost: 6 Glory)

#### Ecclesiarchy Mercenaries

All are unavailable to Ironhead Squat Prospectors  
**Max 2 per Warband:**

* 0-2 Arco-Flagellant (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Death Cult Assassin (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Ministorum Priest (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Ministorum Vindictor (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Salvationist (Cost: 2 Glory)

#### Law Mercenaries

* 0-1 Arbites Enforcer (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Palanite Enforcers  
* 0-1 Hardcase Cyber Mastiff (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to House Orlock or Palanite Enforcers  
* 0-1 Sister of Silence (Cost: 4 Glory) Unavailable to House Dalaque or Warband led by PSYKER

#### Mars Mercenaries

* 0-1 Combat Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Gun Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Magos Errant (Cost: 4 Glory)

* 0-1 Ratling Sniper (Cost: 3 Glory)
